title: paspalum parvulum
intro: Paspalum parvulum, also known as dwarf paspalum, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Paspalum parvulum is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, or topical applications that are believed to promote overall well-being.
